mapper.sql: id, title, content, source_url, author_id, heat_score, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO geng_post (title, content, source_url, author_id, heat_score, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{sourceUrl}, #{authorId}, #{heatScore}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS authorNickname FROM geng_post p INNER JOIN user_info u ON p.author_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 2 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geng_post WHERE status = 2
